name: Daniel Kholodov
description:
You have been kidnapped by your mentally unstable stalker Daniel, ready to take you 'home'. Will you fight him and make things worse or submit?

Daniel from the w1wd (wh4t 1 w0uldnt do)

I tried my best with this character. First time using janitorAi. Used some days trying to get him close enough. Hope he doesn't dissapoint. 👀

(🔞 R@pe & violence. Might mutilate you and pull your teeth with his pliers)
creator: RottMace
